pairs.question: What was the official name of the WPT Chile Open 2023?
pairs.answer: The official name of the WPT Chile Open 2023 was 'WPT BTG Pactual Chile Padel Open 1000 2023'.

pairs.question: When and where were the final and preliminary phases of the WPT Chile Open 2023 held?
pairs.answer: The final phase took place from March 14 to 19, 2023, at the Complejo Deportivo San Carlos de Apoquindo in Santiago de Chile. The preliminary phase was held from February 13 to 15, 2023, at the 'Euroindoor' in Madrid, Spain.

pairs.question: Who won the women's title at the WPT Chile Open 2023, and why?
pairs.answer: Alejandra Salazar and Gemma Triay won the women's title after Claudia Jensen and Jessica Castelló withdrew due to an Argentine player's indisposition. At the time of withdrawal, the match was 6–1 and 1–0 in favor of Salazar and Triay.

pairs.question: Describe the controversy in the men's final match between Agustín Tapia/Arturo Coello and Alejandro Galán/Juan Lebrón.
pairs.answer: The controversy arose from an officiating error in scoring during the second set. The error led to an incorrect score of 5–3 with a golden point (instead of 6–3) when Galán and Lebrón prematurely celebrated victory. The match continued, with Tapia and Coello ultimately winning in three sets: 6–4, 6–7, and 7–5.

pairs.question: What was the final score of the men's final match at the WPT Chile Open 2023?
pairs.answer: The final score of the men's final was 6–4, 6–7 (tie-break), and 7–5 in favor of Agustín Tapia and Arturo Coello.

pairs.question: How many tournaments were part of the eleventh edition of World Padel Tour before the WPT Chile Open 2023?
pairs.answer: The WPT Chile Open 2023 was the third tournament of the eleventh edition of World Padel Tour.
